The '''cave creature''' was a web-spinning, cave-dwelling [[Spider/Legends|arachnid]] that lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tahlboor]].<ref name="Droids: TPO" />

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
While never canonically identified in ''The Protocol Offensive'', [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] does refer to the beast as the "cave creature."

==Appearances==
*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]'' {{1st}}
